<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Empress_dowagers_of_Japan for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Navbox
| name = Empress dowagers of Japan
| bodyclass = hlist
| state = {{{state|autocollapse}}}
| title = {{flagicon|Japan}} [[Empress of Japan#List of empresses dowager|Empresses dowager of Japan]]
| group1 = Legendary
| list1 =
  {{Navbox
    | subgroup
    | groupwidth=5.6em
    | group1 = [[Jōmon period|Jōmon]]
    | list1 =
      {{Navbox
        | subgroup
        | groupwidth = 7.5em
        | groupstyle = font-weight:normal; font-size:90%;
        | group1 = 660 BC–291 BC
        | list1 =
*[[Himetataraisuzu-hime]]
*[[Isuzuyori-hime]]
*Nunasokonakatsu-hime
*Amatoyotsu-hime
*Yosotarashi-hime
      }}
    | group2 = [[:en:Yayoi period|Yayoi]]
    | list2 =
      {{Navbox
        | subgroup
        | groupwidth = 7.5em
        | groupstyle = font-weight:normal; font-size:90%;
        | group1 = 290 BC–269 AD
        | list1 =
*Oshi-hime
*[[Kuwashi-hime]]
*Utsushikome
*[[Ikagashikome]]
*Mimaki-hime
*Yasakairi-hime
*Futajiiri-hime
*[[:en:Empress Jingū|Okinagatarashi-hime]]
      }}
  }}
| group2 = [[:en:Yamato period|Yamato]]

| list2 =
  {{Navbox
    | subgroup
    | groupwidth=5.6em
    | group1 = [[Kofun period|Kofun]]
    | list1 =
      {{Navbox
        | subgroup
        | groupwidth=7.5em
        | groupstyle = font-weight:normal; font-size:90%;
        | group1 = 269–539
        | list1 =
*[[Nakatsuhime]]
*[[Oshisaka no Ōnakatsuhime]]
*[[Princess Tachibana no Nakatsu]]
       }}
    | group2 = [[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]]
    | list2 =
      {{Navbox
        | subgroup
        | groupwidth=7.5em
        | groupstyle = font-weight:normal; font-size:90%;
        | group1 = 539–710
        | list1 =
*[[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]]
      }}
  }}
<!--group3 and group4 not used-->

| group5 = [[:en:Nara period|Nara]]

| list5  =
  {{Navbox
    | subgroup
    | groupwidth = 6.5em
    | groupstyle = font-weight:normal; font-size:90%;
    | group1     = 710–794
    | list1      =
*[[:en:Empress Kōmyō|Fujiwara Asukabehime]]
*Ki no Tochihime{{note label|1|1}}
*[[Takano no Niigasa]]{{note label|1|1}}
  }}
| group6 = [[:en:Heian period|Heian]]
| list6  =
  {{Navbox
    | subgroup

    | groupwidth = 6.5em

    | groupstyle = font-weight:normal; font-size:90%;
    | group1     = 794–1185
    | list1      =
*[[Takano no Niigasa]]{{note label|1|1}}
*[[Fujiwara no Otomuro]]{{note label|1|1}}
*[[:en:Fujiwara no Ryoshi|Fujiwara no Ryoshi]]{{note label|1|1}}
*[[Tachibana no Kachiko]]
*[[:en:Princess Seishi|Princess Seishi]]
*Fujiwara no Junshi
*Fujiwara no Akirakeiko
*Fujiwara no Takaiko{{note label|2|2}}
*Fujiwara no Sawako{{note label|1|1}}
*Fujiwara no Inshi{{note label|1|1}}
*Princess Hanshi
*[[:en:Fujiwara no Onshi|Fujiwara no Onshi]]
*[[:en:Fujiwara no Anshi|Fujiwara no Anshi]]{{note label|1|1}}
*[[Princess Masako (Reizei)|Princess Masako]]
*Fujiwara no Chikako{{note label|1|1}}
*Fujiwara no Senshi
*[[:en:Fujiwara no Junshi|Fujiwara no Junshi]]
*Fujiwara no Tōko{{note label|1|1}}
*[[:en:Empress Shōshi|Fujiwara no Shōshi]]
*[[:en:Fujiwara no Kenshi (994–1027)|Fujiwara no Kenshi]]
*Fujiwara no Yoshiko{{note label|1|1}}
*[[:en:Princess Teishi|Princess Teishi]]
*[[:en:Princess Shōshi (1027–1105)|Princess Shōshi]]
*[[:en:Fujiwara no Hiroko|Fujiwara no Hiroko]]
*Fujiwara no Shigeko{{note label|1|1}}
*[[:en:Fujiwara no Kanshi|Fujiwara no Kanshi]]
*[[:en:Fujiwara no Kenshi (1057–1084)|Fujiwara no Kenshi]]{{note label|1|1}}
*Fujiwara no Ishi{{note label|1|1}}
*[[Fujiwara no Kiyoko]]
*[[Fujiwara no Tashi]]
*Minamoto no Yoshiko{{note label|1|1}}
*[[:en:Kujō-in|Fujiwara no Teishi]]
*Taira no Shigeko
*[[:en:Fujiwara no Kinshi (Go-Shirakawa)|Fujiwara no Kinshi]]
  }}

| group7 = [[:en:Kamakura period|Kamakura]]
| list7 =
 {{Navbox|subgroup |groupwidth=6.5em | groupstyle = font-weight:normal; font-size:90%;
  | group1 = 1185–1333
  | list1 =
*[[:en:Fujiwara no Kinshi (Go-Shirakawa)|Fujiwara no Kinshi]]
*Minamoto no Michiko{{note label|1|1}}
*[[Saionji Kishi]]{{note label|3|3}}
 }}

| group8 = [[:en:Northern Court|Northern Court]]
| list8 =
 {{Navbox|subgroup |groupwidth=6.5em
  | groupstyle = font-weight:normal; font-size:90%;
  | group1 = 1333–1392
  | list1 =
*''None''
 }}

| group9 = [[:en:Muromachi period|Muromachi]]
| list9 =
 {{Navbox|subgroup |groupwidth=6.5em | groupstyle = font-weight:normal; font-size:90%;
  | group1 = 1333–1573
  | list1 =
*Ano no Renshi
*Niwata Asako{{note label|1|1}}
*Madenokōji Eiko{{note label|1|1}}
 }}

| group10 = [[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi-Momoyama]]
| list10 =
 {{Navbox|subgroup |groupwidth=6.5em
  | groupstyle = font-weight:normal; font-size:90%;
  | group1 = 1573–1603
  | list1 =
*''None''
 }}

| group11 = [[:en:Edo period|Edo]]
| list11 =
 {{Navbox|subgroup |groupwidth=6.5em | groupstyle = font-weight:normal; font-size:90%;
  | group1 = 1603–1868
  | list1 =
*Konoe Hisako{{note label|1|1}}
*Nijō Ieko
*Ichijō Tomiko
*Konoe Koreko
*[[:en:Princess Yoshiko (Kōkaku)|Princess Yoshiko]]
*Takatsukasa Yasuko
 }}

| group12 = [[:en:Empire of Japan|Empire of Japan]]
| list12 = <!--(Emperor is supreme ruler)-->
 {{Navbox|subgroup |groupwidth=6.5em
  | groupstyle = font-weight:normal; font-size:90%;
  | group1 = 1868–1947
  | list1 =
*[[:en:Empress Dowager Eishō|Kujō Asako]]
*[[:en:Empress Shōken|Ichijō Masako]]
*[[:en:Empress Teimei|Kujō Sadako]]
 }}

| group13 = [[:en:Japan|State of Japan]]
| list13 = <!--Emperor is nominal ruler-->
 {{Navbox|subgroup |groupwidth=6.5em | groupstyle = font-weight:normal; font-size:90%;
  | group1 = 1947–present
  | list1 =
*[[:en:Empress Teimei|Kujō Sadako]]
*[[:en:Empress Nagako|Princess Nagako]]
 }}
| below = [[File:Japan Kou(tai)gou Flag.svg|border|80px|right|alt=]]
''Unless otherwise noted (as BC), years are in [[:en:Common Era|CE]]{{\}}[[:en:Anno Domini|AD]]''{{Space|6.5em}}
{{note label|1|1}} individuals that were given the title of empress dowager posthumously
{{note label|2|2}} title removed in 896 due to a suspected affair with head priest of the Toko-ji Temple; title posthumously restored in 943
{{note label|3|3}} was made High Empress or ''de jure'' empress dowager during her husband's reign
* [[:en:Imperial House of Japan|Imperial House]]
| belowstyle = background:transparent; padding:0;
}}<noinclude>
{{documentation|content=
{{collapsible option}}
}}</noinclude>

}}</noinclude>
